<!-- Generated by StrongAIAutoDoc 20260314 -->

The directory provides a shared contract layer for a requirements linting workflow. It defines TypeScript interfaces used by clients, servers, and tests to exchange consistent request and response payloads. By centralizing API shapes for quick checks and full specification evaluations, it reduces coupling and serialization drift across components. Consumers import the types to implement, validate, and communicate linter behavior over HTTP using predictable JSON structures.

```mermaid
C4Component
title Requirements Linter API Types - Component View

%% Internal library boundary
Container_Boundary(lib, "requirements-linter-types package") {
  Component(types, "RequirementsLinterApiTypes", "TypeScript interfaces", "Contracts for quick check and specification evaluation requests and responses")
}

%% External consumers and collaborators
Container(client, "Client Application", "TypeScript or JavaScript", "Calls linting APIs and compiles against shared interfaces")
Container(service, "Linting Service", "Node.js Service", "Implements API behavior defined by shared interfaces")
Container(test, "Test Harness", "Jest or similar", "Validates conformance to API contracts with fixtures and assertions")
Container(http, "HTTP JSON API", "REST over JSON", "Transports request and response payloads")

%% Relationships
Rel(client, types, "Imports and compiles against", "TypeScript")
Rel(service, types, "Implements per interface contracts", "TypeScript")
Rel(test, types, "Uses interfaces for fixtures and assertions", "TypeScript")

Rel(client, http, "Sends IQuickCheckRequest and ISpecificationEvaluationRequest", "HTTP POST JSON")
Rel(http, service, "Routes requests and returns responses", "HTTP JSON")
Rel(service, http, "Returns IQuickCheckResponse and ISpecificationEvaluation", "HTTP JSON")

Rel(types, http, "Defines payload shapes and serialization expectations", "JSON")
```

Key components
- RequirementsLinterApiTypes centralizes interface definitions for quick checks and full specification evaluations, enabling strict typing and reliable serialization.
- Client Application imports the types to build valid payloads and handle responses predictably when invoking the linting API.
- Linting Service implements the behavior promised by the interfaces, ensuring compatibility and reducing integration friction.
- Test Harness uses the interfaces to generate fixtures and assertions that catch contract regressions.
- HTTP JSON API is the transport where these contracts become wire formats, keeping client and service aligned end to end.
